steps.title: Text Stream Portal live scenario
steps.action: connect and open resident session
steps.expected_visual: operator follows JSON step transcript

steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.action: publish full portal chrome + transcript viewport
steps.expected_visual: portal surface appears at right edge with header, body, footer

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.action: hold for operator observation
steps.expected_visual: portal surface visible; body text readable

steps.title: Composer focus gained
steps.action: runtime focus manager focused the composer hit region
steps.expected_visual: subsequent keyboard events route to composer

steps.title: Composer pointer down

steps.expected_visual: keyboard focus should move to composer

steps.expected_visual: composer text window reflects runtime draft state

steps.title: Output scroll contract
steps.action: mount long output, register scroll, step offset, append tail, return
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane scrolls through bounded transcript data, then returns to latest lines

steps.title: Mount long output
steps.action: registered vertical scroll config and mounted bounded output
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane shows first transcript window within portal bounds

steps.title: Scroll output window
steps.action: set scroll_y=40px
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane advances through transcript while chrome remains readable

steps.title: Scroll output window
steps.action: set scroll_y=80px
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane advances through transcript while chrome remains readable

steps.action: set scroll_y=120px

steps.action: set scroll_y=160px

steps.title: Composer caret smoke
steps.action: render hello-world and long-paste composer states with visible caret
steps.expected_visual: caret aligns with text after Space and wrapped markdown paste

steps.title: Composer hello world rendered
steps.action: rendered normal typing target with Space between words
steps.expected_visual: hello world appears once, caret after the final d

steps.title: Composer long paste rendered
steps.action: rendered wrapped markdown-like paste with caret at end
steps.expected_visual: caret remains on the final wrapped row without a one-character lag at line ends

steps.title: Composer edit sequence
steps.action: render empty → typed → mid-delete → cleared states
steps.expected_visual: caret tracks correctly through all edit states; no phantom characters

steps.title: Composer edit state 0
steps.action: empty — placeholder visible
steps.expected_visual: composer shows ''; caret at position 0

steps.title: Composer edit state 1
steps.action: typed 'Hello' — caret after final l
steps.expected_visual: composer shows 'Hello'; caret at position 5

steps.title: Composer edit state 2
steps.action: typed ', world!' — caret at end
steps.expected_visual: composer shows 'Hello, world!'; caret at position 13

steps.title: Composer edit state 3
steps.action: deleted '!' — caret at d
steps.expected_visual: composer shows 'Hello, world'; caret at position 12

steps.title: Composer edit state 4
steps.action: deleted ', world' — back to 'Hello'
steps.expected_visual: composer shows 'Hello'; caret at position 5

steps.title: Composer edit state 5
steps.action: deleted 'o' — mid-word
steps.expected_visual: composer shows 'Hell'; caret at position 4

steps.title: Composer edit state 6
steps.action: cleared — placeholder re-appears
steps.expected_visual: composer shows ''; caret at position 0

steps.title: Cadence RTT-overhead measurement
steps.action: measure transport RTT baseline, then publish 20 sequential updates with ~100ms pacing; record per-append publish→present timestamps and report runtime overhead separately from RTT
steps.expected_visual: portal body updates each cycle; footer shows cycle index and last RTT

steps.title: Transport RTT baseline measured
steps.action: probe transport round-trip latency floor before streaming
steps.expected_visual: no visible change; baseline used to isolate runtime overhead

steps.title: Cadence RTT-overhead measurement
steps.action: all cycles complete; RTT baseline + runtime-overhead reported
steps.expected_visual: portal stable; body settled on last cycle content

steps.title: Window management sequence
steps.action: move portal → boundary clamp → minimize → restore → return to origin
steps.expected_visual: portal moves cleanly; minimize icon appears; restore brings full portal back

steps.title: Portal moved to centre
steps.action: portal_x=1060, portal_y=400
steps.expected_visual: portal repositioned to centre of scene; chrome intact

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal moved cleanly to scene centre with chrome intact

steps.title: Boundary clamp verified
steps.expected_visual: portal visible at bottom-right edge; not partially offscreen

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: out-of-bounds move clamped to scene edge; portal stays fully on-screen

steps.title: Portal minimized
steps.action: portal tiles hidden; minimized icon rendered at current position
steps.expected_visual: circular icon visible; full portal surface hidden

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: full portal surface hidden; only the minimized icon remains visible

steps.title: Portal restored to origin
steps.action: portal restored at (2092,120)
steps.expected_visual: full portal visible at origin position; icon gone; chrome intact

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: restore brought the full portal back at its origin; minimized icon gone; chrome intact

steps.title: Visual profile swap
steps.action: cycle compact → standard → expanded portal chrome profiles
steps.expected_visual: portal chrome dimensions shift each cycle; body text remains readable; no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'compact'
steps.action: set portal to 680×520px, title_font=16.0pt, body_font=14.0pt
steps.expected_visual: portal resizes to compact chrome dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'compact' profile; chrome dimensions shifted and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'standard'
steps.action: set portal to 1720×1360px, title_font=18.0pt, body_font=16.0pt
steps.expected_visual: portal resizes to standard chrome dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'standard' profile; chrome dimensions shifted and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'expanded'
steps.action: set portal to 1978×1564px, title_font=20.0pt, body_font=18.0pt
steps.expected_visual: portal resizes to expanded chrome dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'expanded' profile; chrome dimensions shifted and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Profile 'standard'
steps.action: set portal to 1720×1360px, title_font=18.0pt, body_font=16.0pt
steps.expected_visual: portal resizes to standard chrome dimensions; content remains readable

operator_evidence.operator_confirm: portal reskinned to 'standard' profile; chrome dimensions shifted and body text remained readable with no layout collapse

steps.title: Compositor-path diagnostic input
steps.action: inject OS pointer, wheel, and Unicode input into the live overlay
steps.expected_visual: composer focuses, portal drags, and OUTPUT pane scrolls via the normal runtime input path

steps.title: Composer focus lost
steps.action: runtime focus manager moved focus away from composer
steps.expected_visual: composer stops receiving keyboard events

steps.title: Composer focus gained
steps.action: runtime focus manager focused the composer hit region
steps.expected_visual: subsequent keyboard events route to composer

steps.title: Composer pointer down
steps.action: input composer received pointer down
steps.expected_visual: keyboard focus should move to composer

steps.title: Composer focus lost
steps.action: runtime focus manager moved focus away from composer
steps.expected_visual: composer stops receiving keyboard events

steps.title: Portal drag started
steps.action: header drag surface received pointer down
steps.expected_visual: portal follows pointer while dragging

steps.title: Portal drag ended
steps.action: all portal tiles committed to grouped position
steps.expected_visual: input/output panes remain aligned with portal frame

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.action: portal received local-first scroll offset
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.action: portal received local-first scroll offset
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Output transcript scrolled
steps.action: portal received local-first scroll offset
steps.expected_visual: output text stays clipped inside transcript box

steps.title: Compositor-path diagnostic input
steps.action: Windows OS input injector finished
steps.expected_visual: transcript should include input:focus-gained, drag:start/drag:end, and scroll:output checkpoints

steps.title: Text Stream Portal scenario complete
steps.action: review transcript and capture UX notes
steps.expected_visual: portal visible until cleanup releases the lease

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
